text:
「無限連戦：追憶の彼方へ」に続く
アークス用の訓練プログラム第二弾です。
各惑星の舞台に用意されたミッションに
新たな要素を加えた高度な訓練です。
制限時間内に全てを達成するのは困難ですが
好成績を目指してください。
――――――――――――――――――――
目標／ハイスコアの獲得
最大与ダメージ制限／999999

This ARKS training program is a follow-up to
"Endless Battle: Edge of Recollection." The
program is more intense and adds a number of
new elements to missions which incorporate
different planetary environments. Completing
all the missions within the given time limit will
be difficult, but we trust you will give it your all.
-------------------------------------------
Your goal is to achieve a high score.
Maximum dealable damage is limited to 999,999.
制限時間内により多くのスコアを獲得せよ！
Score as many points within the given time limit!

Preparing to initiate the Endless Quest.
Complete as many missions as you can within
the allotted time limit to increase your score.

There are now new types of "Mission Orders" available,
so pay attention to the instructions given.
I'll leave you to it. Good luck.
